description: fetch the BIDS schema.json from upstream and write references/bids_schema.json (read-only network fetch)
rules: read-only: fetches a remote artifact, never mutates a remote service
downloads from SCHEMA_URL (default: stable ReadTheDocs schema export)
validates the payload is JSON and re-serializes with consistent indentation
no dependencies beyond the Python standard library
usage: Set SCHEMA_URL (default https://bids-specification.readthedocs.io/en/stable/schema.json; may be a version pin or a BEP-specific preview URL). Output: bids_schema.json.
limitation: Requires network access to reach SCHEMA_URL. Offline the porter degrades gracefully — it writes an empty {} artifact and exits 0 so the contract still holds, but the schema is not refreshed.
